"The Kingdom of God is not in word but in power."

About the Evangelist

Evangelist
Oluwasegun Emmanuel

A missionary from Africa, called and commissioned to bring the Charismatic Revival to the nations of Europe. Grounded in faith and fuelled by an extraordinary encounter with the Lord Jesus Christ, this ministry exists to awaken hearts and release the transformative power of God across the continent.

"Jesus commissioned me to awaken nations with the Charismatic Fire of Revival and prepare the church for His imminent return."

As an author of two impactful books, Evangelist Emmanuel equips believers with inspired writings that ignite a passion for Christ and stir a deep hunger for the supernatural.

Published Works

Books by the Evangelist

A Divine Encounter

I Saw Jesus

In a profound revelation, the Lord Jesus Christ appeared and issued a personal mandate: awaken the nations of Europe with the Charismatic Fire of Revival. This calling is not merely a ministry programme — it is a movement of God, commissioned from heaven, aimed at transforming lives, igniting churches, and preparing the Bride of Christ for His imminent return.

Our Mission

What We Are
Called to Do

01
Supernatural Reality in ChristTo bring believers into the full reality of their supernatural life in Christ Jesus.
02
Establish Local ChurchesTo plant and establish local churches worldwide that spiritually build and mature believers.
03
Global Crusades & OutreachesTo hold crusades and evangelical outreaches across the globe, reaching the lost and the unchurched.
04
Demonstrate God's PowerTo demonstrate the charismatic power of God to the nations with signs, wonders, and miracles.

"The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to proclaim good news."

Luke 4:18

"Go into all the world and proclaim the gospel to the whole creation."

Mark 16:15

The Foundation

3 Pillars of Our Ministry

1
🔥

Charismatic Fire of Revival

Experience tangible manifestations of God's power as the Holy Spirit moves. Revival fire that changes atmospheres, breaks chains, and transforms communities from the inside out.

2
✨

Healing & the Miraculous

Witness incredible miracles and powerful testimonies as God demonstrates His love through supernatural healing and the working of wonders among His people.

3
🕊️

Raising Charismatic Disciples

Engage in deep, spirit-filled teachings that equip, empower, and release believers into their God-given calling — building the next generation of revivalists.

The European Mandate

in Europe

We believe that revival fire will burn across Europe, awakening every heart. The Kingdom of God is not just in word — it is in power. We are looking for partners, pastors, and pioneers who carry this same fire.
